observation: Creator capsule routes now cover 14 retained routes with standardized vision QA, a unified regression orchestrator, a Darwin autonomy pre-flight check, multi-surface proof infrastructure, a Playwright chromium health pre-flight (catches binary version drift before silent 0/11 failures), and a docs-surface parity check. The docs-surface parity check catches drift between WORKFLOW_INDEX, CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md, mutation-candidates.json, and filesystem before it accumulates across autonomous Darwin runs. Remaining gap: individual surface health validation — running each creator:*check per surface before multi-surface-proof aggregates, catching broken individual surfaces earlier.
population: creator capsule proof/check surface mutations for catching drift and maintaining cross-repo consistency across autonomous Darwin runs
selection_pressure: help a creator verify all surfaces in one pass, pre-flight the execution environment, and keep docs, examples, and checks in sync without manual inspection

candidates.mutation: Add a parity check (bun creator:docs-surface-parity) that validates WORKFLOW_INDEX.md surface entries, mutation-candidates.json retained_routes, CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md retained mutations, examples/*.html files, multi-surface-proof SURFACES list, and package.json script entries are in sync — catching the recurring docs/surface drift failure mode.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-docs-surface-parity.ts that cross-references WORKFLOW_INDEX.md table entries, retained_routes in the candidate ledger, CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md retained mutations, actual examples/*.html files for creator surfaces, multi-surface-proof SURFACES, and package.json script entries — reporting any missing/mismatched entries
candidates.risk: Must parse WORKFLOW_INDEX.md markdown table reliably; must handle new surface additions gracefully. Known mapping between doc (creator-vision-qa-standardization) and JSON (creator-touchdesigner-vision-qa-route).

candidates.mutation: Add a slice health check (bun creator:cron-slice-health) that validates the most recent autonomous Darwin cron slice completed cleanly — verifies PR state, branch SHA, CI status, and merge evidence for the last Darwin PR on the repo.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-cron-slice-health.ts that queries GitHub API for recent Darwin PRs, checks CI/merge state on the most recent, and reports slice completion evidence (branch, SHA, PR URL, merge status, CI verdict)
candidates.risk: Requires GitHub API access (gh or GITHUB_TOKEN). Must handle no-Darwin-PR-yet gracefully (first-run state). Must not leak private repo details in output.

candidates.mutation: Add a per-surface health check (bun creator:surface-health) that runs each individual creator:*check gate for every examples/creator-*.html surface, reporting per-surface PASS/FAIL status — catching broken individual surfaces before multi-surface-proof aggregates them.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-surface-health.ts that iterates all surface HTML files, runs the corresponding creator:*check (poster-check, social-card-check, etc.), and produces a per-surface PASS/FAIL table with timing
candidates.risk: Requires all surface check scripts to be individually executable. Must handle surface HTML files without a dedicated *check script gracefully. Timing may be slow if some checks involve browser automation.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff
standardized browser DOM/vision QA evidence for TouchDesigner surface (provider-fallback pattern, real browser_console DOM verification, needle-aligned QA)
unified regression orchestrator (16-check surface + autonomy + hackathon:score in one pass)
Darwin autonomy pre-flight check (repo anchor, git cleanliness, MCP connectivity, baseline gates)
unified artifact-measurement gateway (all 11 retained surface HTML artifacts validated against measure:check + print:render in one pass)

Playwright Chromium binary health pre-flight (validates cache-dir, chromium-dir, binary, and measure:check smoke test to prevent silent 0/11 failures from binary version drift in autonomous Darwin cron runs)

retention: Promote creator-playwright-health-route to retained_routes (shipped in PR #48, was in CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md retained mutations but absent from JSON retained_routes — now unified). Promote creator-docs-surface-parity-route as the selected winner: catches drift between WORKFLOW_INDEX.md, CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md, mutation-candidates.json, examples/*.html, multi-surface-proof SURFACES list, and package.json in one pass. Add creator-surface-health-route as new active candidate to catch broken individual surfaces before multi-surface-proof aggregates.
